title: Valiant
body:
![valiantlogo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/011a8dd20e8ecd4bb136a5490491d3dc6062444a.png)
##

### A Vulkan Based Modpack Made for Performance
![frames](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f1f3bb8e24c559ce857132e9257e4a1d0a2ec8c.png)

### Floats Like a Butterfly, Stings Like a Bee
Valiant keeps the modlist light with only a handful of mods for the insane performance gains

### Stupid Simple
The Vulkan mod means that there is only one true dependancy, meaning everything is easier to tinker with!

### Hardware Freedom
Unlike other modpacks like Nvidia Optimized, Valiant can run on any system that supports the Vulkan rendering system. (Which is basially everything!)
